name: Mend.io
description: Monitor software composition analysis, vulnerability scanning, and security policy enforcement across your organization's projects with Mend.io (formerly WhiteSource)

credentialFields.label: API Base URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Mend API base URL. Find it in Mend App → Integrate → Organization → API Base URL. Examples: https://api-saas.mend.io, https://api-app.mend.io, https://api-saas-eu.mend.io

credentialFields.label: Email
credentialFields.helpText: Your Mend account email (Mend Platform → My Profile → General)

credentialFields.label: User Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your Mend user key (Mend Platform → My Profile → User Keys). For production use, create a Service User in Administration → Users.

credentialFields.label: Organization UUID
credentialFields.helpText: Your organization UUID (Mend Platform → Administration → General Configuration → Organization UUID)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews all users in the Mend.io organization and their account status

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies that vulnerability scanning and monitoring is active across projects in the Mend.io organization

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists all projects and applications in the Mend.io organization as infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Verifies that security policy enforcement and vulnerability tracking is active in Mend.io
